info.name: HappyPhoto Module Wise API
info.description: Module-wise Postman collection generated from the HappyPhoto Express routes, controllers, and docs. Query parameters and request body fields include short descriptions for faster testing. Set the url and token variables before sending protected requests.

request.description:
## Body Fields
- `name`: Display name for the user, admin, product, or content owner.
- `email`: Valid account email address.
- `password`: Current account password.
- `confirmPassword`: Must match the password or newPassword field.
- `role`: Account role. Supported values include USER, PROPERTY_HOST, DRIVER, MERCHANT, ADMIN.
- `phoneNumber`: Phone number in local or international format.

## Body Fields
- `email`: Valid account email address.
- `password`: Current account password.

## Body Fields
- `email`: Valid account email address.
- `activationCode`: OTP code sent to the email during registration.

## Body Fields
- `email`: Valid account email address.

## Body Fields
- `email`: Valid account email address.

## Body Fields
- `email`: Valid account email address.
- `code`: OTP code sent during the forgot-password flow.

## Body Fields
- `email`: Valid account email address.
- `newPassword`: New password to set after verification or password change.
- `confirmPassword`: Must match the password or newPassword field.

## Body Fields
- `oldPassword`: Current password used to authorize the password change.
- `newPassword`: New password to set after verification or password change.
- `confirmPassword`: Must match the password or newPassword field.

formdata.description: Display name for the user, admin, product, or content owner.
Phone number in local or international format.
Date of birth, preferably ISO date format such as 1995-01-01.
Physical address or profile address text.
Image file used as the user or admin profile photo.

request.description:
## Body Fields
- `name`: Display name for the user, admin, product, or content owner.
- `phoneNumber`: Phone number in local or international format.
- `dateOfBirth`: Date of birth, preferably ISO date format such as 1995-01-01.
- `address`: Physical address or profile address text.
- `profile_image`: Image file used as the user or admin profile photo.

## Body Fields
- `email`: Valid account email address.
- `password`: Current account password.

formdata.description: Driver license number for driver verification.
Vehicle plate number for driver verification.
Image file of the driving license.
Image file of the driver identity card.
Image file of the vehicle registration document.

request.description:
## Body Fields
- `licenseNumber`: Driver license number for driver verification.
- `plateNumber`: Vehicle plate number for driver verification.
- `drivingLicense_image`: Image file of the driving license.
- `idCard_image`: Image file of the driver identity card.
- `vehicleRegistration_image`: Image file of the vehicle registration document.

## Body Fields
- `storeName`: Public store name shown to customers.
- `businessType`: Type of business, for example Retail, Grocery, or Restaurant.
- `businessRegistrationNumber`: Official business registration number.
- `vatNumber`: VAT or tax registration number if applicable.

## Body Fields
- `storeLocationCoordinatesLat`: Latitude coordinate for the merchant store.
- `storeLocationCoordinatesLong`: Longitude coordinate for the merchant store.
- `storeAddress`: Street address of the merchant store.
- `storeCity`: City where the store is located.
- `storeState`: State, division, or province of the store.
- `storePostalCode`: Postal or ZIP code for the store address.
- `storeCountry`: Country where the store is located.

formdata.description: Short public description of the store.
Store opening time, for example 09:00 or 09:00 AM.
Store closing time, for example 22:00 or 10:00 PM.
Average preparation time in minutes.
Store logo image file.
Store banner image file.

request.description:
## Body Fields
- `storeDescription`: Short public description of the store.
- `storeOpeningTime`: Store opening time, for example 09:00 or 09:00 AM.
- `storeClosingTime`: Store closing time, for example 22:00 or 10:00 PM.
- `storeAveragePrepTime`: Average preparation time in minutes.
- `store_logo`: Store logo image file.
- `store_banner_image`: Store banner image file.

formdata.description: Photo of the physical storefront.
Trade license document image.
Merchant owner identity card image.

request.description:
## Body Fields
- `store_front_image`: Photo of the physical storefront.
- `trade_license_document`: Trade license document image.
- `merchant_id_card_image`: Merchant owner identity card image.

## Body Fields
- `storeDeliveryRadius`: Maximum delivery radius served by the store.
- `storeMinimumOrder`: Minimum order total required by the store.
- `storePhoneNumber`: Public support phone number for the store.
- `storeSupportEmail`: Public support email address for the store.
- `storeIsOpen`: Whether the store is currently accepting orders.
- `businessHours`: Weekly opening schedule. Each day can include open and close times.
- `businessHours.[day].open`: Opening time for that day.
- `businessHours.[day].close`: Closing time for that day.

## Body Fields
- `vehicleType`: Vehicle type such as car, bike, or scooter.
- `licenseNumber`: Driver license number for driver verification.
- `plateNumber`: Vehicle plate number for driver verification.

formdata.description: Display name for the user, admin, product, or content owner.
Phone number in local or international format.
Physical address or profile address text.
Image file used as the user or admin profile photo.

request.description:
## Body Fields

query.description: Page number for paginated results. Use 1 for the first page.
Maximum number of records to return per page.
Optional free-text search across configured searchable fields.

request.description:
## Query Parameters
Supports pagination and optional search/filter fields from the query builder.

- `page`: Page number for paginated results. Use 1 for the first page.
- `limit`: Maximum number of records to return per page.
- `searchTerm`: Optional free-text search across configured searchable fields. Optional sample; enable it when needed.

## Body Fields
- `authId`: MongoDB ObjectId of the Auth record.
- `isBlocked`: true blocks the account; false unblocks it.

## Body Fields
- `userId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a user profile.

## Body Fields
- `userId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a user profile.
- `reason`: Short reason shown in admin, rejection, refund, or cancellation history.

## Body Fields
- `userId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a user profile.

## Body Fields
- `userId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a user profile.

query.description: Page number for paginated results. Use 1 for the first page.
Maximum number of records to return per page.
Optional status filter, for example pending, preparing, delivered, or completed depending on this module.

request.description:
## Query Parameters
Supports pagination and optional order status filtering.

- `page`: Page number for paginated results. Use 1 for the first page.
- `limit`: Maximum number of records to return per page.
- `status`: Optional status filter, for example pending, preparing, delivered, or completed depending on this module. Optional sample; enable it when needed.

query.description: Page number for paginated results. Use 1 for the first page.

formdata.description: Display name for the user, admin, product, or content owner.
Product category used for grouping and filtering.
Product price as a number.
Quantity to add, update, or keep in stock.
Main text or HTML content for this record.
Product image file.

request.description:
## Body Fields
- `name`: Display name for the user, admin, product, or content owner.
- `category`: Product category used for grouping and filtering.
- `price`: Product price as a number.
- `quantity`: Quantity to add, update, or keep in stock.
- `description`: Main text or HTML content for this record.
- `product_image`: Product image file.

query.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the product to retrieve or operate on.

request.description:

- `productId`: MongoDB ObjectId of the product to retrieve or operate on.

query.description: Page number for paginated results. Use 1 for the first page.
Maximum number of records to return per page.
Optional free-text search across configured searchable fields.
Optional product category filter.

request.description:
## Query Parameters
Supports pagination, text search, category filtering, sorting, and field selection if enabled by the query builder.

- `page`: Page number for paginated results. Use 1 for the first page.
- `limit`: Maximum number of records to return per page.
- `searchTerm`: Optional free-text search across configured searchable fields. Optional sample; enable it when needed.
- `category`: Optional product category filter. Optional sample; enable it when needed.

formdata.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the product.
Display name for the user, admin, product, or content owner.
Product category used for grouping and filtering.
Product price as a number.
Quantity to add, update, or keep in stock.
Main text or HTML content for this record.
Product image file.

request.description:
## Body Fields
- `productId`: MongoDB ObjectId of the product.
- `name`: Display name for the user, admin, product, or content owner.
- `category`: Product category used for grouping and filtering.
- `price`: Product price as a number.
- `quantity`: Quantity to add, update, or keep in stock.
- `description`: Main text or HTML content for this record.
- `product_image`: Product image file.

## Body Fields
- `productId`: MongoDB ObjectId of the product.

formdata.description: Public name of the property.
Property type such as apartment, vacation_rental, house, condo, or other.
Full property street address, only exposed where allowed.
Property city.
Property state, division, or province.
Property postal or ZIP code.
Property country.
Property latitude coordinate.
Property longitude coordinate.
Property image file.

request.description:
## Body Fields
- `propertyName`: Public name of the property.
- `propertyType`: Property type such as apartment, vacation_rental, house, condo, or other.
- `physicalAddress`: Full property street address, only exposed where allowed.
- `city`: Property city.
- `state`: Property state, division, or province.
- `postalCode`: Property postal or ZIP code.
- `country`: Property country.
- `lat`: Property latitude coordinate.
- `long`: Property longitude coordinate.
- `property_image`: Property image file.

formdata.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the property.
Public name of the property.
Property type such as apartment, vacation_rental, house, condo, or other.
Whether this property is active and usable for deliveries.
Property image file.

request.description:
## Body Fields
- `propertyId`: MongoDB ObjectId of the property.
- `propertyName`: Public name of the property.
- `propertyType`: Property type such as apartment, vacation_rental, house, condo, or other.
- `isActive`: Whether this property is active and usable for deliveries.
- `property_image`: Property image file.

## Body Fields
- `propertyId`: MongoDB ObjectId of the property.

query.description: Short unique property code used to resolve or attach a delivery destination.

request.description:
## Query Parameters
- `propertyCode`: Short unique property code used to resolve or attach a delivery destination.

## Body Fields
- `propertyId`: MongoDB ObjectId of the property.
- `defaultWindowStart`: Default delivery window start time for the property.
- `defaultWindowEnd`: Default delivery window end time for the property.
- `guestStayCheckIn`: Guest check-in date/time in ISO 8601 format.
- `guestStayCheckOut`: Guest check-out date/time in ISO 8601 format.

## Body Fields
- `requestId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a delivery request.
- `deliveryWindowStart`: Requested or approved delivery window start date/time in ISO 8601 format.
- `deliveryWindowEnd`: Requested or approved delivery window end date/time in ISO 8601 format.
- `guestStayCheckIn`: Guest check-in date/time in ISO 8601 format.
- `guestStayCheckOut`: Guest check-out date/time in ISO 8601 format.

## Body Fields
- `requestId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a delivery request.
- `reason`: Short reason shown in admin, rejection, refund, or cancellation history.

## Body Fields
- `propertyCode`: Unique guest/property code used for property-based deliveries.
- `deliveryAddress`: Manual delivery address when no propertyCode is used.
- `deliveryLat`: Delivery latitude coordinate.
- `deliveryLong`: Delivery longitude coordinate.
- `specialInstructions`: Optional delivery notes for merchant, host, or driver.

query.description: Earnings summary period. Accepted examples: today, week, month.

request.description:

- `period`: Earnings summary period. Accepted examples: today, week, month.

query.description: Page number for paginated results. Use 1 for the first page.
Maximum number of records to return per page.

request.description:
## Query Parameters
Returns merchant transaction records with pagination.

- `page`: Page number for paginated results. Use 1 for the first page.
- `limit`: Maximum number of records to return per page.

## Body Fields
- `id`: Stripe event ID.
- `object`: Stripe object type, usually event for webhook payloads.
- `type`: Stripe event type, for example payment_intent.succeeded.
- `data`: Stripe event data wrapper. This sample is only for local structure reference.
- `data.object`: Stripe object type, usually event for webhook payloads.
- `data.object.id`: Stripe event ID.
- `data.object.metadata`: Sample request field.
- `data.object.metadata.paymentId`: MongoDB ObjectId of the payment document.

## Body Fields
- `description`: Full Terms and Conditions content, usually HTML or markdown.
